title: Enjoyed by Many Mouths
tags:
While I was studying reference images, I asked one of the community members if I could use her photographs to take her to one of my worlds.
She approved.
Feels like she made our world that much more interesting place to be living in, no?
She wished to remain anonymous. But just know that she's out there, amongst us, somewhere.



Animating bikini wrinkles and pulsating mouths was pretty fun with a surprisingly fluid process.
For other Blender animators, they're about 5 to 10 shape keys each, sculpted and taking turns.
(I got a few cloth physics trainings and assets. But they're not quite ready for something that stable. So it had to be all manual labor, lots of yanking and steaming.)

Been experimenting with new slime/flesh assets, but didn't quite work out for this composition.
Also wanted more tentacles for additional massages in various places.
But alas, this thing was supposed to have finished by late January, and it's already the end of March.
All unused ideas and new toys are reserved for future projects.



The base 3D assets are from SmutBase, and then nearly everything about their shapes has been modified.

The SFX are from OpenNSFW, the open source ones, then modified to sound heavier/thicker.

Made with Blender and DaVinci Resolve.
